description_long: This is a three-story brick hotel building with a flat roof and classic urban architecture. The facade features large rectangular windows with white trim, and a metal fire escape runs along one side of the building. The ground floor has a main entrance with a small awning, flanked by a bench and a trash can, and the sidewalk is detailed with street elements like a stop sign and streetlights. Graffiti and murals are visible on the side and rear walls, adding to the urban character. The building sits on a concrete base with a curb, and the roof has HVAC units and a large billboard. The overall appearance suggests a mid-20th-century style, common in dense city neighborhoods.
description: A three-story brick hotel with large windows, a metal fire escape, urban street details, and a rooftop billboard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance with a small awning, bench, trash can, and three stories of windows.
description_view_1: Rear view displays a plain brick wall with a mural and some street elements, no windows on this side.
description_view_2: Side view highlights the fire escape, graffiti, and several windows, with a traffic cone and curb detail.
description_view_3: Opposite side view features the fire escape, a stop sign, a mural on the lower wall, and a large rooftop billboard.
